local_results.title: Fore River Sanctuary
local_results.description: Tranquil hiking trail with a waterfall winding through woods, marsh and bridges.
local_results.user_review: "It’s a lovely hiking area with a waterfall, marshlands, and boardwalks."

local_results.title: Presumpscot River Preserve
local_results.description: Tranquil riverside park with a waterfall, hiking trails, for-leash dogs and open spaces.
local_results.user_review: "Gentle, relaxing out-and-back hike with absolutely stunning views."

local_results.title: Eastern Promenade Trail
local_results.description: Scenic waterside trail that leads to a beach that’s dog-friendly.
local_results.user_review: "Really nice trail, picturesque, peaceful and a lot of benches to relax."

local_results.title: Jewell Falls - Rowe Trailhead
local_results.description: Short and long woodland trails with maps of the area, leading to a waterfall.
local_results.user_review: "Great hike shaded from heat kids enjoyed it so much fun."

local_results.title: Wolfe's Neck Woods State Park
local_results.description: Guided nature walks & osprey-watching. Park composed of woodland, estuary & rocky coast, known for guided nature walks & osprey-watching.
local_results.user_review: "Beautiful scenery and hiking trails with a mixture of ocean views and woods."

local_results.title: Fore River Trail
local_results.user_review: "The mosquitoes will welcome you enthusiastically."

local_results.title: Back Cove Park
local_results.description: Waterfront multiuse trail & green space. Large park featuring a 3.5-mile, waterfront loop trail for jogging & biking, plus open green space.
local_results.user_review: "Bring your partner for an intimate walk and great photos."

local_results.title: Back Cove Trail
local_results.user_review: "Very well maintained trail loop (about 3 miles) around Back Cove."

local_results.title: Capisic Brook Trail
local_results.user_review: "It was absolutely beautiful to walk along!"

local_results.title: Western Promenade
local_results.description: Elevated park with trails & scenic views. 18.1-acre park featuring scenic trails around bluffs, plus statues & stately 19th-century homes.
local_results.user_review: "Scenic views and lots of free parking."

local_results.title: Cascade Falls Trail
local_results.description: Little wooded attraction featuring the titular falls plus trails and a fairy village.
local_results.user_review: "Nice wooded short trails leading to a waterfall."

local_results.title: Portland Head light Cliff Walk
local_results.address: 12 Captain Strout Cir, Cape Elizabeth, ME 04107
local_results.user_review: "I walked the entire Trail and it is in good shape!"

local_results.title: Brook Trail
local_results.user_review: "Water view, unpaved wide trail and small parking lot behind Payson Park"

local_results.title: Bayside Trail
local_results.user_review: "Very nice, flat and safe path."

local_results.title: Bradbury Mountain State Park
local_results.description: Small mountain with mixed-use trails. Small, glacial mountain with camping, plus trails shared by hikers, horses, bikes & snowmobiles.
local_results.user_review: "The trails are groomed nicely, well marked, and easy to follow."

local_results.title: Mackworth Island State Park
local_results.address: Andrews Avenue off, US-1, Falmouth, ME 04105
local_results.description: Island refuge with trails & seabirds. Tranquil haven with rocky beaches & shorebirds, plus a round-the-island trail & views of Casco Bay.
local_results.user_review: "Great hike trails, beach front, very quiet, peaceful"

local_results.title: Oat Nuts Park Trail
local_results.description: Park featuring hiking and cycling trails plus views of the Presumpscot River.
local_results.user_review: "Lovely walking trails that lead to the Presumpscot River."

local_results.title: Mayor Baxter Woods
local_results.description: Leafy nature preserve with walking paths. Pine forested, dog-friendly park offering shaded trails for walking, running & cycling.
local_results.user_review: "Great, well maintained paths.."

local_results.title: Two Lights State Park
local_results.description: Coastal park with scenic views & trails. 41-acre oceanfront park offers twin lighthouses, shoreline trails & scenic views amid a rocky coast.
local_results.user_review: "... shoreline and a well-maintained system of trails & paths."

local_results.title: The Eastern Trail
local_results.description: Flat, graveled former rail track with scenic views of the Scarborough Marsh, a wildlife refuge known for birds.
local_results.user_review: "Beautiful length of the eastern trail."
